calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Dipak Patel is present in pro per.

Defendants Randy Copper and Vicky Towel are present.
Betsy Johnsen representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. This case settled, the trial date of September 10, 2007 is vacated.
